message:
refactor(gateway): extract URL security utilities to shared module

Moves SSRF protection logic to reusable url-security.ts module:
- isPrivateNetworkUrl(): Validate webhook URLs against internal networks
- escapeSlackMrkdwn(): Slack mrkdwn character escaping
- escapeSlackUrl(): URL escaping for Slack link format

notification.service.ts and ntm-ws-bridge.service.ts now import from
shared utility module instead of duplicating the security checks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
